title: rubus suberectus subsp. plicatus
intro: Rubus suberectus subsp. plicatus is a subspecies of the Rubus suberectus plant, commonly known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, which is a type of bramble found in the Himalayan region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus suberectus subsp. plicatus include its potential to help lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain types of cancer. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also consumed fresh as a fruit.
